entry_points.name: app
entry_points.summary: ASGI app built from create_app(Settings.from_env(...)); served by uvicorn.

entry_points.name: create_app
entry_points.summary: FastAPI app factory with 9 GET routes + bearer auth.

entry_points.name: next.py
entry_points.summary: Pure planner CLI: (state, protocol, command) -> action JSON.

entry_points.name: advance.py
entry_points.summary: Sole state writer CLI: verdicts -> mutate/publish/CAS-push/re-dispatch.

entry_points.name: run-checks.py
entry_points.summary: Language-agnostic check runner over the Check ABI.

entry_points.name: lib.py
entry_points.summary: Engine shared library + thin CLI (python3 lib.py <subcommand>).

entry_points.name: install.sh
entry_points.summary: Installer entry: drop engine + chosen protocols into a repo.

apis.name: GitHubClient
apis.summary: httpx GitHub REST client with error taxonomy (NotFound/RateLimited/UpstreamError).

apis.name: state_reader
apis.summary: Reads engine state as a data contract into status/stats/gates envelopes; never imports the engine.

modules.name: lib
modules.summary: cas_push, route, validate_protocol, open_gate, do_answer, decide, resolve_executable, match_run_by_cid, set_check_run.

modules.name: next
modules.summary: Pure planner; enter_root + recursive sequencing on NODE_PATH.

modules.name: advance
modules.summary: Sole state writer; decide() fold; publish/dispatch.

modules.name: paths
modules.summary: Pure NODE_PATH tree navigation and state-file addressing.

modules.name: join
modules.summary: Recursive fan-out AND-barrier; bubbles nested joins.

modules.name: run-checks
modules.summary: Data-driven check resolution + execution; forwards CHECK_PARAMS.

modules.name: resolve
modules.summary: Pure resolution of every agent workflow a protocol references at any depth.

modules.name: receipt
modules.summary: Install receipt write/diff/drift/version-compat via content hashes.

modules.name: config
modules.summary: Frozen Settings dataclass; Settings.from_env with required-var validation.

modules.name: models
modules.summary: Pydantic response envelopes: ProtocolList, InstanceList, GatesResponse, GlobalStats.

tests.name: test_engine
tests.summary: Planner + advance writer + lib CAS; single-agent + fanout regression using fixtures.

tests.name: test_decide
tests.summary: The decide() fold over verdict severities.

tests.name: conftest
tests.summary: Bare-git fake agentic-state origin, ENGINE_LOCAL=1, run_engine/run_check/read_state_yaml helpers.

config.name: pyproject.toml
config.summary: uv project manifest; runtime + dev deps; requires-python >=3.10.

config.name: protocol.schema.json
config.summary: JSON Schema backing the protocol.json DSL.

config.name: agentic-orchestrator.yml
config.summary: Router workflow (union on:, route job, calls reusable engine).

dependencies.name: httpx
dependencies.summary: HTTP client for the GitHub client.

dependencies.name: PyYAML
dependencies.summary: YAML parsing for engine state + api state reader (only hard engine runtime dep).

dependencies.name: uvicorn
dependencies.summary: ASGI server for the api/ service.

dependencies.name: jsonschema
dependencies.summary: Structural protocol validation (linter's structural layer; optional at runtime).

ownership.name: engine
ownership.summary: Generic protocol-agnostic state machine. No protocol-specific logic.

ownership.name: protocols
ownership.summary: Six shipped protocols; each self-contained (states, evidence schemas, checks, publish hooks).

ownership.name: workflows
ownership.summary: Router, reusable engine (trust zones), gh-aw agent locks, join evaluator, lint.

ownership.name: api
ownership.summary: Read-only FastAPI visibility service over engine state.

ownership.name: docs
ownership.summary: Design rationale, DSL reference, authoring hub, status/deviations.

risk_areas.name: engine/lib.py
risk_areas.summary: 1703 lines; #1 git hotspot (70 changes/90d); many responsibilities.

risk_areas.name: engine/advance.py
risk_areas.summary: 720 lines; SOLE state writer; corruption risk.

risk_areas.name: egress-firewall-disabled
risk_areas.summary: gh-aw agents run strict:false + sandbox.agent:false (deliberate); biggest security weakening.

risk_areas.name: shell-injection-surface
risk_areas.summary: Agent-derived strings must be passed via env:, never interpolated into run: blocks.
